ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2009 Continued To Jul-20-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Alan G. Rodier, Esq. for Plaintiff: Steve Labanowski, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Bob Nicut as follows:
Damages $45,000.00
Costs $335.00, for a total of $45,335.00
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Continued To Jun-08-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
